mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM user_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_profile (user_id, version_no) VALUES (#{userId}, 1)

INSERT INTO user_profile ( user_id, desired_job, desired_industry, education, career, projects, skills, certificates, languages, portfolio_links, resume_text, self_intro, preferences, version_no ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{desiredJob}, #{desiredIndustry}, #{education}, #{career}, #{projects}, #{skills}, #{certificates}, #{languages}, #{portfolioLinks}, #{resumeText}, #{selfIntro}, #{preferences}, 1 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE desired_job = VALUES(desired_job), desired_industry = VALUES(desired_industry), education = VALUES(education), career = VALUES(career), projects = VALUES(projects), skills = VALUES(skills), certificates = VALUES(certificates), languages = VALUES(languages), portfolio_links = VALUES(portfolio_links), resume_text = VALUES(resume_text), self_intro = VALUES(self_intro), preferences = VALUES(preferences), version_no = user_profile.version_no + 1, deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.sql: id, user_id, version_no, desired_job, desired_industry, education, career, projects, skills, certificates, languages, portfolio_links, resume_text, self_intro, preferences, source, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_profile_version ( user_id, version_no, desired_job, desired_industry, education, career, projects, skills, certificates, languages, portfolio_links, resume_text, self_intro, preferences, source ) SELECT user_id, version_no, desired_job, desired_industry, education, career, projects, skills, certificates, languages, portfolio_links, resume_text, self_intro, preferences, #{source} FROM user_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_profile_version WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY version_no DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT p.* FROM user_profile p INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id
p.deleted_at IS NULL
AND (u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.desired_job LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
